# N6 Inevitability Engine: Energy-Efficient Neural Architectures from Perfect Number Arithmetic

## Paper Outline for arXiv Submission

### Target: cs.LG (Machine Learning) + cs.AI

---

## Abstract (~200 words)

We present 16 energy-efficiency techniques for neural networks derived from the arithmetic properties of the perfect number 6. We show that the balance ratio R(n) = sigma(n)*phi(n)/(n*tau(n)) equals 1 uniquely at n=6 among integers >= 2, and that this condition characterizes energy-opti
